calendar.matters:
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-01-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of And Motion For Order Compelling Defendant Dullea'S Deposition And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-05-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Arnold I. Berschler, Esq. of Berschler Associates PC, T:800.338.1441, for plaintiff and moving party;
Tom Feeney, Esq. of Carbone Smoke Smith Bent & Leonard, T:510.267.7273, for defendant and opposing party.

RULING: The issue of the sanctions was argued. At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopted the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF DEFRANTZ COPELAND'S Motion For Order Compelling Defendant Dullea's Deposition And For Monetary Sanctions - The motion is MOOT, as the deposition was taken December 11, 2017. Discovery sanctions of $2,000 are awarded against Dullea for delaying the deposition some five months in this limited jurisdiction case.

ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter CSR#6576, email: rhunter@sftc.org.

Notice Of And Motion For Order Compelling Defendant Dullea'S Deposition And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-08-2017 Continued To Jan-05-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: ATTY ARNOLD I. BERSCHLER OF BERSCHLER ATTORNEY AT LAW TEL NO. 1.800.338.1441 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF DEFRANTZ COPELAND;
ATTY THOMAS J. FEENEY OF LAW OFFICES OF CARBONE, SMOKE, SMITH, BENT AND LEONARD TEL NO. 510.267.7273 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT JEFFREY DULLEA.

RULING - Defendant did not stipulate for the judge pro tem to hear the matter. PLAINTIFF DEFRANTZ COPELAND Motion For Order Compelling Defendant Dullea's Deposition And For Monetary Sanctions is continued to January 5, 2018 at 9:30am in dept. 302, proceedings not reported; Judge: Gregory A. Call; Clerk: Johnny Sengmany (HK/JPT/D301).
